question: Why did drive-thru lane speed slip 22 seconds at franchise stores during Friday dinner this past week vs corp stores?
metric_label: Drive-thru speed by ownership type, daypart, and day

upstream_models.description: POS-sourced order records with entry_ts, confirm_ts, and serve_ts. Includes ownership_type (franchise, corporate), store_id, and daypart bucket (breakfast, lunch, dinner, late-night).
Store master with ownership_type, franchisee_group, region, and POS firmware version. The firmware_version column was added last quarter — version 4.2.1 carries the loyalty-program update.

Loyalty program interaction events at the POS. Includes order_confirm_add_ms — the milliseconds added to order-confirm time by the loyalty lookup step when the POS firmware processes it inline rather than async.
Calendar spine with daypart classifications (breakfast 05:00-10:30, lunch 10:30-14:00, dinner 16:00-20:00, late-night 20:00-02:00). Joins to order_transaction on calendar_date and hour bucket.
